overview.short: Mohajmata Temple is a temple in Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Mohajmata Temple is a temple in Madhya Pradesh, India. The temple is dedicated to a goddess named Mohajmata. This is probably Kali. It is listed as a monument of national importance.

topPlaces.name: Kadwaya
topPlaces.description: Kadwaya (Kadwāyā), also called Kadwaha (Kadwāhā), is a village in Madhya Pradesh, India. It is located in the Isagarh Tehsil in the Ashoknagar district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mohajmata temple, Terahi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mohajmata temple, Terahi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mohajmata temple, Terahi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (142 km) and the nearest railway station is Jhansi Junction (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mohajmata temple, Terahi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mohajmata temple, Terahi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mohajmata temple, Terahi?
faq.a: Stays in Mohajmata temple, Terahi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
